TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: pulu' tikulac samataan mitesekay masadumaay nika babenis ÁēĆ:ŚčēÁČ©ÁēĆ Animalia salaedan: kasadumaay aadupan nu salaedan Animalia ťĖÄ:ŤĄäÁīĘŚčēÁČ©ťĖÄ Chordata sacumud: sacumud dami'ay aadupan Chordata Á∂Ī:ť≥•Á∂Ī Aves udip: udip a ayam Aves Áõģ:ťõěŚĹĘÁõģ Galliformes mata: mata nu wayway a tulakukan Galliformes ÁßĎ:ťõČÁßĎ Phasianidae samataan: smataan tikulacan phasianidae ŚĪ¨:ÁęĻťõěŚĪ¨ Bambusicola mikeliday: mikeliday a tikulacan Bambusicola Á®ģ:ÁęĻťõě B. thoracicus masasengiay: masasengiay tikulac B. thoracicus Bambusicola thoracica (masadumaay a ngangan)Bambusicola thoracica (tada ngangan)hua-nan-cu-ce-ku, ni-hua-hua, san-cun-zi, cu-ce-ku, pu-tong-cu-ci kaliwasak nu kitidaan itini i Taywan atu satimulan nu Cung-guo Cang-ciang , taamis katukuh tu timulan nu San-si , tatip katukuh tu saatipan nu Si-cuan enal, tawali katukuh tu Bu-cian , tungus pahanhanan han i buyu', enal, kilangkilangan, au'kau'kan atu lutuklutukan. nina tikulac tada kasiidaan han i Cong-kuo , kaliwasakan i walian nu Cong-kuo walian, nikudan satu malaheci pataydan i Dipun , Sya-wei-yi atu A-gen-ting . Taywan a tikulac masacidek tu ayda. wayway nu picidekan Cang-ciang timulan a niyaduan tikulac pangangan han tu "ni-hua-hua", "cu-ce-ku", anu caay sa "bian-kuan-kuan". mata ku tulakuk a mataan, samataan ku tikulac. bangcal ku banuh nina ayam. aadihan nu kitakitay nu ayaman, itimul hinaadih kita tina kasidumaan a ayaman. tamaan a ayaman manamuh milalebu', sawni kunlinagan nu tademaw u mibihbihay a ayaman han, sapaadih tu miadihay. 300ŚÖčŚ∑¶ŚŹ≥. tikulac tanayu' han makaala tu tulu a bataan a li-mi, ba'ked han tusa a lasubu~tulu a lasubu lima a bataan a ke, tada ayam satu tamaan a ayaman makaala tu tulu a ke'an. sangucud han lumeniay a kulitan anucaaysa micapitu hese a kulitan, dais atu kalaw han u abuabuan ku kulit, tunduh nu tangah atu nikuda nu liel kala mangaduay nu cukana' a hese nu kulitan, idaw ku adidiay nu snglacay a tungawan, baluwan han abuabuan ku kulit, pangkiw kunipi haliyud, sasa nu ayawan han u kala lumenian ku zongse, hamawsa mala lumenian ku lawlawan a kulitan, baluwan han lumeniay a hese nu tungawan, babelih nu sadipaan atu taludu' kala kalawlawan nu hese a kulitan. . itidasa maudip i aukaukan. miki adidi' tu ce-ku ku udip, banuhan kala hesean situngawm, manamuh mukan tu aayal a puduhan. tada wayway 29cm. . abuwan nu baluwan a tikulac, u adidiay nu tulakukan ku sausi. tanayu'han makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku siwa a cong-fun. apuyu ku laway, hese ku kulit. matahan kala hesean ku kulit. tangah, tapiingan nu liel, ngaduy, takulaw sa u kala lumenian ku sumanah nu kulitan. pabaw han u kalawlawan nu cukanaan a hese nu kulitan, lumeniay a hese masapungec nu babayuhan nu adidi a tungawan, tangah idaw ku malalamelay tu zongse a tungawan, dais atu kulul kala abuabuan ku kulit, kalaw han sumilaway abuabuan, sutinsa pasayda i nikuda katukuh tu lilis nu nikudan. .nikudan han malalamel tu kala lumenian nu tungawan atu adidiay nu sanglacay a tungawan. abala nu banuh atu kilul nu banuhan malecad, nika u sanglacay nu tungawan ku yadah. picidekan maudip . tikulac caay kaw matalawan tu tademaw, anucaay patalawan, micapi tu tademaw u laad han tulu~lima a mi mikilim tu kakanen atu malalebu. manamuh ku tikulac i sasa nu buyu, kilakilangan, lutuklutukan, aukaukan masakaput amidang, tulu ~lima a ayaman atu cacay a bataan caay piasip, masa cacay ku silac amidang. lalud han itida tu i buyubuyuan amidang, kasienawan hantu tasasa i sasa nu buyu, sawacan atu kilakilanga mikilim tu kakanen. labii satu masilactu i kilakilangan mucekaw madadecdec masasudiheku, anu siimelangay nu tikulacan atu hetik sananay nu tikulacan, idawtu ku duma a tikulacan micumud tunika lahad amicelcel. tikulac u cancanan a lutukan a heci, papah nu lami', mangaduay nu papah, masaheciay a heci atu adidiay nu cilekayan ku kanen. nipahabayan nu tademawhan u kupkup ku kanen, usal, madapanay, muka tu cilekay nu pangan. tikulac manamuh mudadiw, malacing ku suni, taynaan a tikulacan han masa cacay ku hanhanan " ti, ti, ti" sa apuyu ku suni, tamaan a sunian han mihidau u "bian-guan-guan, bian-guan-guan" sa, matulin kuni pidadiwan, katukuh tuni kangeluan kiya masaluemen kuni ka sunian, itida i Si-cuan a kitidaan pangangan han tu "bian-kuan-kuan". . u tademaw mangalay misamsam tu tikulacan masunisa, nu tulakuk kuni nanaman nuheni amiwiwi masuni, makatengil satu ku tikulac, satu idaw ku midebungay sa, palecaden nida ku suni paculi, amelik satu micapi tu mangalay midebung, taynaan a tukulacan mikilul tu tamaan a tikulacan mikipadang. kasiti'kukan satu caay pisengal mudadiw. hican mibuwah tikulac nu mihcaan a tuluay a buladan malingatu siti'kuk, imahini sa nu masaupuway alaw malaliwasak kuni kalecabayan, tamaan a tikulacan micidek mialaw tu kitidaan, nialawan tu kitidaan sa, caay pacumud tu tamaan a tikulacan matalaw debung, sisa itini kunuheni amalalebu. ÁĒĘŚćĶŚú®4ÔĹě5śúąšĽĹ, . kasi ti'kukan han i sepatay ~limaay a buladan, itini i madecdecay nu kilakilangan, lutuklutukan, au'kau'kan ilala' misadibu, upapah ku labu, maacakay nu lutuk ku sangaan tu dibu. cacaya a dadibuan han pitu ~sabaw tusa ku ti'kuk, ba'ked nu ti'kuk han sabaw tu lima a ke', kala duudan ku sanglac nu kulitan anucaaysa kala hesean ku kulit, idaw ku zongse nu adidiay a tungawan atu kala abuabuan nu tungawan a kulitan. wina kumidiputay mititi tu ti'ku, amititi' tu wawa han sabaw tu enem~ sabaw tu walu a demiadan, satanayusa nudemiadan han makaala tu tusa a bataan a demiadan, titi'sa malaayam tu, malaayam satu miladay tu tuyna maduba', mikilim tu kakanen. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
S.PHON: pur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tikur~…ĺa ¶ samataan mit…ôs…ôkaj masadumaaj nika bab…ônis *:*** animar~…ĺia sar~…ĺa…ôdan: kasadumaaj aadupan nu sar~…ĺa…ôdan animar~…ĺia *:***** ¶ńßordata sa ¶umud: sa ¶umud dami Ē~ °aj aadupan ¶ńßordata *:** a*…ôs udip: udip a ajam a*…ôs *:*** gar~…ĺr~…ĺiform…ôs mata: mata nu wajwaj a tur~…ĺakukan gar~…ĺr~…ĺiform…ôs *:** pńßasianida…ô samataan: smataan tikur~…ĺa ¶an pńßasianida…ô *:*** bambusi ¶or~…ĺa mik…ôr~…ĺidaj: mik…ôr~…ĺidaj a tikur~…ĺa ¶an bambusi ¶or~…ĺa *:** b. tńßora ¶i ¶us masas…ôŇčiaj: masas…ôŇčiaj tikur~…ĺa ¶ b. tńßora ¶i ¶us bambusi ¶or~…ĺa tńßora ¶i ¶a (masadumaaj a ŇčaŇčan)bambusi ¶or~…ĺa tńßora ¶i ¶a (tada ŇčaŇčan)ńßua-nan- ¶u- ¶…ô-ku, ni-ńßua-ńßua, san- ¶un-zi, ¶u- ¶…ô-ku, pu-toŇč- ¶u- ¶i kar~…ĺiwasak nu kitidaan itini i tajwan atu satimur~…ĺan nu ¶uŇč-guo ¶aŇč- ¶iaŇč , taamis katukuńß tu timur~…ĺan nu san-si , tatip katukuńß tu saatipan nu si- ¶uan …ônar~…ĺ, tawar~…ĺi katukuńß tu bu- ¶ian , tuŇčus pańßanńßanan ńßan i buju Ē~ °, …ônar~…ĺ, kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, au Ē~ °kau Ē~ °kan atu r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan. nina tikur~…ĺa ¶ tada kasiidaan ńßan i ¶oŇč-kuo , kar~…ĺiwasakan i war~…ĺian nu ¶oŇč-kuo war~…ĺian, nikudan satu mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i patajdan i dipun , sja-w…ôi-ji atu a-g…ôn-tiŇč . tajwan a tikur~…ĺa ¶ masa ¶id…ôk tu ajda. wajwaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan ¶aŇč- ¶iaŇč timur~…ĺan a nijaduan tikur~…ĺa ¶ paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "ni-ńßua-ńßua", " ¶u- ¶…ô-ku", anu ¶aaj sa "bian-kuan-kuan". mata ku tur~…ĺakuk a mataan, samataan ku tikur~…ĺa ¶. baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku banuńß nina ajam. aadińßan nu kitakitaj nu ajaman, itimur~…ĺ ńßinaadińß kita tina kasidumaan a ajaman. tamaan a ajaman manamuńß mir~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu Ē~ °, sawni kunr~…ĺinagan nu tad…ômaw u mibińßbińßaj a ajaman ńßan, sapaadińß tu miadińßaj. ******. tikur~…ĺa ¶ tanaju Ē~ ° ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a bataan a r~…ĺi-mi, ba Ē~ °k…ôd ńßan tusa a r~…ĺasubu~tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan a k…ô, tada ajam satu tamaan a ajaman makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a k…ô Ē~ °an. saŇču ¶ud ńßan r~…ĺum…ôniaj a kur~…ĺitan anu ¶aajsa mi ¶apitu ńß…ôs…ô a kur~…ĺitan, dais atu kar~…ĺaw ńßan u abuabuan ku kur~…ĺit, tunduńß nu taŇčańß atu nikuda nu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ kar~…ĺa maŇčaduaj nu ¶ukana Ē~ ° a ńß…ôs…ô nu kur~…ĺitan, idaw ku adidiaj nu sŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a tuŇčawan, bar~…ĺuwan ńßan abuabuan ku kur~…ĺit, paŇčkiw kunipi ńßar~…ĺijud, sasa nu ajawan ńßan u kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ônian ku zoŇčs…ô, ńßamawsa mar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ônian ku r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan a kur~…ĺitan, bar~…ĺuwan ńßan r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ńß…ôs…ô nu tuŇčawan, bab…ôr~…ĺińß nu sadipaan atu tar~…ĺudu Ē~ ° kar~…ĺa kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu ńß…ôs…ô a kur~…ĺitan. . itidasa maudip i aukaukan. miki adidi Ē~ ° tu ¶…ô-ku ku udip, banuńßan kar~…ĺa ńß…ôs…ôan situŇčawm, manamuńß mukan tu aajar~…ĺ a puduńßan. tada wajwaj ** ¶m. . abuwan nu bar~…ĺuwan a tikur~…ĺa ¶, u adidiaj nu tur~…ĺakukan ku sausi. tanaju Ē~ °ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan idaw ku siwa a ¶oŇč-fun. apuju ku r~…ĺawaj, ńß…ôs…ô ku kur~…ĺit. matańßan kar~…ĺa ńß…ôs…ôan ku kur~…ĺit. taŇčańß, tapiiŇčan nu r~…ĺi…ôr~…ĺ, Ňčaduj, takur~…ĺaw sa u kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ônian ku sumanańß nu kur~…ĺitan. pabaw ńßan u kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu ¶ukanaan a ńß…ôs…ô nu kur~…ĺitan, r~…ĺum…ôniaj a ńß…ôs…ô masapuŇč…ô ¶ nu babajuńßan nu adidi a tuŇčawan, taŇčańß idaw ku mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj tu zoŇčs…ô a tuŇčawan, dais atu kur~…ĺur~…ĺ kar~…ĺa abuabuan ku kur~…ĺit, kar~…ĺaw ńßan sumir~…ĺawaj abuabuan, sutinsa pasajda i nikuda katukuńß tu r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu nikudan. .nikudan ńßan mar~…ĺar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ tu kar~…ĺa r~…ĺum…ônian nu tuŇčawan atu adidiaj nu saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj a tuŇčawan. abar~…ĺa nu banuńß atu kir~…ĺur~…ĺ nu banuńßan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, nika u saŇčr~…ĺa ¶aj nu tuŇčawan ku jadańß. pi ¶id…ôkan maudip . tikur~…ĺa ¶ ¶aaj kaw matar~…ĺawan tu tad…ômaw, anu ¶aaj patar~…ĺawan, mi ¶api tu tad…ômaw u r~…ĺaad ńßan tur~…ĺu~r~…ĺima a mi mikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu. manamuńß ku tikur~…ĺa ¶ i sasa nu buju, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan, aukaukan masakaput amidaŇč, tur~…ĺu ~r~…ĺima a ajaman atu ¶a ¶aj a bataan ¶aaj piasip, masa ¶a ¶aj ku sir~…ĺa ¶ amidaŇč. r~…ĺar~…ĺud ńßan itida tu i bujubujuan amidaŇč, kasi…ônawan ńßantu tasasa i sasa nu buju, sawa ¶an atu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇča mikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn. r~…ĺabii satu masir~…ĺa ¶tu i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan mu ¶…ôkaw madad…ô ¶d…ô ¶ masasudińß…ôku, anu siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj nu tikur~…ĺa ¶an atu ńß…ôtik sananaj nu tikur~…ĺa ¶an, idawtu ku duma a tikur~…ĺa ¶an mi ¶umud tunika r~…ĺańßad ami ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ. tikur~…ĺa ¶ u ¶an ¶anan a r~…ĺutukan a ńß…ô ¶i, papańß nu r~…ĺami Ē~ °, maŇčaduaj nu papańß, masańß…ô ¶iaj a ńß…ô ¶i atu adidiaj nu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan ku kan…ôn. nipańßabajan nu tad…ômawńßan u kupkup ku kan…ôn, usar~…ĺ, madapanaj, muka tu ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkaj nu paŇčan. tikur~…ĺa ¶ manamuńß mudadiw, mar~…ĺa ¶iŇč ku suni, tajnaan a tikur~…ĺa ¶an ńßan masa ¶a ¶aj ku ńßanńßanan " ti, ti, ti" sa apuju ku suni, tamaan a sunian ńßan mińßidau u "bian-guan-guan, bian-guan-guan" sa, matur~…ĺin kuni pidadiwan, katukuńß tuni kaŇč…ôr~…ĺuan kija masar~…ĺu…ôm…ôn kuni ka sunian, itida i si- ¶uan a kitidaan paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "bian-kuan-kuan". . u tad…ômaw maŇčar~…ĺaj misamsam tu tikur~…ĺa ¶an masunisa, nu tur~…ĺakuk kuni nanaman nuńß…ôni amiwiwi masuni, makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ satu ku tikur~…ĺa ¶, satu idaw ku mid…ôbuŇčaj sa, par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn nida ku suni pa ¶ur~…ĺi, am…ôr~…ĺik satu mi ¶api tu maŇčar~…ĺaj mid…ôbuŇč, tajnaan a tukur~…ĺa ¶an mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu tamaan a tikur~…ĺa ¶an mikipadaŇč. kasiti Ē~ °kukan satu ¶aaj pis…ôŇčar~…ĺ mudadiw. ńßi ¶an mibuwańß tikur~…ĺa ¶ nu mińß ¶aan a tur~…ĺuaj a bur~…ĺadan mar~…ĺiŇčatu siti Ē~ °kuk, imańßini sa nu masaupuwaj ar~…ĺaw mar~…ĺar~…ĺiwasak kuni kar~…ĺ…ô ¶abajan, tamaan a tikur~…ĺa ¶an mi ¶id…ôk miar~…ĺaw tu kitidaan, niar~…ĺawan tu kitidaan sa, ¶aaj pa ¶umud tu tamaan a tikur~…ĺa ¶an matar~…ĺaw d…ôbuŇč, sisa itini kunuńß…ôni amar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu. ********, . kasi ti Ē~ °kukan ńßan i s…ôpataj ~r~…ĺimaaj a bur~…ĺadan, itini i mad…ô ¶d…ô ¶aj nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, r~…ĺutukr~…ĺutukan, au Ē~ °kau Ē~ °kan ir~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° misadibu, upapańß ku r~…ĺabu, maa ¶akaj nu r~…ĺutuk ku saŇčaan tu dibu. ¶a ¶aja a dadibuan ńßan pitu ~sabaw tusa ku ti Ē~ °kuk, ba Ē~ °k…ôd nu ti Ē~ °kuk ńßan sabaw tu r~…ĺima a k…ô Ē~ °, kar~…ĺa duudan ku saŇčr~…ĺa ¶ nu kur~…ĺitan anu ¶aajsa kar~…ĺa ńß…ôs…ôan ku kur~…ĺit, idaw ku zoŇčs…ô nu adidiaj a tuŇčawan atu kar~…ĺa abuabuan nu tuŇčawan a kur~…ĺitan. wina kumidiputaj mititi tu ti Ē~ °ku, amititi Ē~ ° tu wawa ńßan sabaw tu …ôn…ôm~ sabaw tu war~…ĺu a d…ômiadan, satanajusa nud…ômiadan ńßan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa a bataan a d…ômiadan, titi Ē~ °sa mar~…ĺaajam tu, mar~…ĺaajam satu mir~…ĺadaj tu tujna maduba Ē~ °, mikir~…ĺim tu kakan…ôn. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: pulu' tikulac samataan mitesekay masadumaay nika babenis ÁēĆ:ŚčēÁČ©ÁēĆ Animalia salaedan: kasadumaay aadupan nu salaedan Animalia ťĖÄ:ŤĄäÁīĘŚčēÁČ©ťĖÄ Chordata sacumud: sacumud dami'ay aadupan Chordata Á∂Ī:ť≥•Á∂Ī Aves udip: udip a ayam Aves Áõģ:ťõěŚĹĘÁõģ Galliformes mata: mata nu wayway a tulakukan Galliformes ÁßĎ:ťõČÁßĎ Phasianidae samataan: smataan tikulacan phasianidae ŚĪ¨:ÁęĻťõěŚĪ¨ Bambusicola mikeliday: mikeliday a tikulacan Bambusicola Á®ģ:ÁęĻťõě B. thoracicus masasengiay: masasengiay tikulac B. thoracicus Bambusicola thoracica (masadumaay a ngangan)Bambusicola thoracica (tada ngangan)hua-nan-cu-ce-ku, ni-hua-hua, san-cun-zi, cu-ce-ku, pu-tong-cu-ci kaliwasak nu kitidaan itini i Taywan atu satimulan nu Cung-guo Cang-ciang , taamis katukuh tu timulan nu San-si , tatip katukuh tu saatipan nu Si-cuan enal, tawali katukuh tu Bu-cian , tungus pahanhanan han i buyu', enal, kilangkilangan, au'kau'kan atu lutuklutukan. nina tikulac tada kasiidaan han i Cong-kuo , kaliwasakan i walian nu Cong-kuo walian, nikudan satu malaheci pataydan i Dipun , Sya-wei-yi atu A-gen-ting . Taywan a tikulac masacidek tu ayda. wayway nu picidekan Cang-ciang timulan a niyaduan tikulac pangangan han tu "ni-hua-hua", "cu-ce-ku", anu caay sa "bian-kuan-kuan". mata ku tulakuk a mataan, samataan ku tikulac. bangcal ku banuh nina ayam. aadihan nu kitakitay nu ayaman, itimul hinaadih kita tina kasidumaan a ayaman. tamaan a ayaman manamuh milalebu', sawni kunlinagan nu tademaw u mibihbihay a ayaman han, sapaadih tu miadihay. 300ŚÖčŚ∑¶ŚŹ≥. tikulac tanayu' han makaala tu tulu a bataan a li-mi, ba'ked han tusa a lasubu~tulu a lasubu lima a bataan a ke, tada ayam satu tamaan a ayaman makaala tu tulu a ke'an. sangucud han lumeniay a kulitan anucaaysa micapitu hese a kulitan, dais atu kalaw han u abuabuan ku kulit, tunduh nu tangah atu nikuda nu liel kala mangaduay nu cukana' a hese nu kulitan, idaw ku adidiay nu snglacay a tungawan, baluwan han abuabuan ku kulit, pangkiw kunipi haliyud, sasa nu ayawan han u kala lumenian ku zongse, hamawsa mala lumenian ku lawlawan a kulitan, baluwan han lumeniay a hese nu tungawan, babelih nu sadipaan atu taludu' kala kalawlawan nu hese a kulitan. . itidasa maudip i aukaukan. miki adidi' tu ce-ku ku udip, banuhan kala hesean situngawm, manamuh mukan tu aayal a puduhan. tada wayway 29cm. . abuwan nu baluwan a tikulac, u adidiay nu tulakukan ku sausi. tanayu'han makaala tu tusa a bataan idaw ku siwa a cong-fun. apuyu ku laway, hese ku kulit. matahan kala hesean ku kulit. tangah, tapiingan nu liel, ngaduy, takulaw sa u kala lumenian ku sumanah nu kulitan. pabaw han u kalawlawan nu cukanaan a hese nu kulitan, lumeniay a hese masapungec nu babayuhan nu adidi a tungawan, tangah idaw ku malalamelay tu zongse a tungawan, dais atu kulul kala abuabuan ku kulit, kalaw han sumilaway abuabuan, sutinsa pasayda i nikuda katukuh tu lilis nu nikudan. .nikudan han malalamel tu kala lumenian nu tungawan atu adidiay nu sanglacay a tungawan. abala nu banuh atu kilul nu banuhan malecad, nika u sanglacay nu tungawan ku yadah. picidekan maudip . tikulac caay kaw matalawan tu tademaw, anucaay patalawan, micapi tu tademaw u laad han tulu~lima a mi mikilim tu kakanen atu malalebu. manamuh ku tikulac i sasa nu buyu, kilakilangan, lutuklutukan, aukaukan masakaput amidang, tulu ~lima a ayaman atu cacay a bataan caay piasip, masa cacay ku silac amidang. lalud han itida tu i buyubuyuan amidang, kasienawan hantu tasasa i sasa nu buyu, sawacan atu kilakilanga mikilim tu kakanen. labii satu masilactu i kilakilangan mucekaw madadecdec masasudiheku, anu siimelangay nu tikulacan atu hetik sananay nu tikulacan, idawtu ku duma a tikulacan micumud tunika lahad amicelcel. tikulac u cancanan a lutukan a heci, papah nu lami', mangaduay nu papah, masaheciay a heci atu adidiay nu cilekayan ku kanen. nipahabayan nu tademawhan u kupkup ku kanen, usal, madapanay, muka tu cilekay nu pangan. tikulac manamuh mudadiw, malacing ku suni, taynaan a tikulacan han masa cacay ku hanhanan " ti, ti, ti" sa apuyu ku suni, tamaan a sunian han mihidau u "bian-guan-guan, bian-guan-guan" sa, matulin kuni pidadiwan, katukuh tuni kangeluan kiya masaluemen kuni ka sunian, itida i Si-cuan a kitidaan pangangan han tu "bian-kuan-kuan". . u tademaw mangalay misamsam tu tikulacan masunisa, nu tulakuk kuni nanaman nuheni amiwiwi masuni, makatengil satu ku tikulac, satu idaw ku midebungay sa, palecaden nida ku suni paculi, amelik satu micapi tu mangalay midebung, taynaan a tukulacan mikilul tu tamaan a tikulacan mikipadang. kasiti'kukan satu caay pisengal mudadiw. hican mibuwah tikulac nu mihcaan a tuluay a buladan malingatu siti'kuk, imahini sa nu masaupuway alaw malaliwasak kuni kalecabayan, tamaan a tikulacan micidek mialaw tu kitidaan, nialawan tu kitidaan sa, caay pacumud tu tamaan a tikulacan matalaw debung, sisa itini kunuheni amalalebu. ÁĒĘŚćĶŚú®4ÔĹě5śúąšĽĹ, . kasi ti'kukan han i sepatay ~limaay a buladan, itini i madecdecay nu kilakilangan, lutuklutukan, au'kau'kan ilala' misadibu, upapah ku labu, maacakay nu lutuk ku sangaan tu dibu. cacaya a dadibuan han pitu ~sabaw tusa ku ti'kuk, ba'ked nu ti'kuk han sabaw tu lima a ke', kala duudan ku sanglac nu kulitan anucaaysa kala hesean ku kulit, idaw ku zongse nu adidiay a tungawan atu kala abuabuan nu tungawan a kulitan. wina kumidiputay mititi tu ti'ku, amititi' tu wawa han sabaw tu enem~ sabaw tu walu a demiadan, satanayusa nudemiadan han makaala tu tusa a bataan a demiadan, titi'sa malaayam tu, malaayam satu miladay tu tuyna maduba', mikilim tu kakanen. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan
